content.text: I'm engaging the helix skill because your `.helix.yml` doesn't exist yet and you asked to "start a helix project" — that's the router-anchor for the helix methodology.

Let me set the marker to authorize the helix flow and then draft a product vision for the coffee-ordering app as the first artifact; the graph lists product-vision as the upstream input every downstream artifact (PRD, FEAT) informs from. I'll keep scope to `docs/helix/` and won't touch other roots.
